name: Faithful Autoformalization of Natural Language Assertions
summary: arXiv:2607.13303v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Formal contracts are essential for software testing and verification, yet writing them remains labor-intensive and error-prone. LLMs offer...
description: arXiv:2607.13303v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Formal contracts are essential for software testing and verification, yet writing them remains labor-intensive and error-prone. LLMs offer a promising path toward autoformalization: synthesizing executable assertions from natural-language specifications and thereby bridging the gap between informal developer intent and formal executable...
author: Hongyi Liu, Madhusudan Parthasarathy, Adithya Murali
